name: urban-traffic-platform
description: Plateforme Intelligente de Gestion du Trafic Urbain

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd services/auth && npm install && cd ../vehicles && npm install && cd ../traffic && npm install && cd ../incidents && npm install && cd ../notifications && npm install && cd ../../gateway && npm install
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:vehicles" "npm run start:traffic" "npm run start:incidents" "npm run start:notifications" "npm run start:gateway"
